  Branch naming:  <type>/JIRA-123-short-description
  PR title:       <type>(<scope>): description
  Types: feat | fix | chore | docs | refactor | test | hotfix | release
-->

<!-- What changes does this PR make? Be specific. -->

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? List steps so a reviewer can verify. -->
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] No regressions in existing tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/JIRA-123-description` convention
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format
- [ ] JIRA ticket referenced above
- [ ] Reviewers assigned
- [ ] Labels added (if large PR, add `large-pr`)
